ast.name: error
ast.target: 创建商业模型画布时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the name of your business. This will be used in the canvas file name.
ast.target: 输入您的业务名称。这将用于画布文件名。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 商业模型画布创建成功！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create business model canvas. Check if the folder is read-only.
ast.target: 创建商业模型画布失败。请检查文件夹是否为只读。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F91D} Key Partners

* Who are our Key Partners?
* Who are our key suppliers?
* Which Key Resources are we acquiring from partners?
* Which Key Activities do partners perform?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F91D} 关键合作伙伴

* 我们的关键合作伙伴是谁？
* 我们的主要供应商是谁？
* 我们从合作伙伴那里获取哪些关键资源？
* 合作伙伴执行哪些关键活动？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u2699\uFE0F Key Activities

* What Key Activities do our Value Propositions require?
* Our Distribution Channels?
* Customer Relationships?
* Revenue streams?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u2699\uFE0F 关键活动

* 我们的价值主张需要哪些关键活动？
* 我们的分销渠道？
* 客户关系？
* 收入来源？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4E6} Key Resources

* What Key Resources do our Value Propositions require?
* Our Distribution Channels?
* Customer Relationships?
* Revenue streams?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F4E6} 关键资源

* 我们的价值主张需要哪些关键资源？
* 我们的分销渠道？
* 客户关系？
* 收入来源？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F381} Value Propositions

* What value do we deliver to the customer?
* Which one of our customer's problems are we helping to solve?
* What bundles of products and services are we offering to each Customer Segment?
* Which customer needs are we satisfying?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F381} 价值主张

* 我们为客户传递什么价值？
* 我们正在帮助解决客户的哪个问题？
* 我们为每个客户细分群体提供哪些产品和服务组合？
* 我们正在满足哪些客户需求？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u2764\uFE0F Customer Relationships

* What type of relationship does each of our Customer Segments expect us to establish and maintain with them?
* Which ones have we established?
* How are they integrated with the rest of our business model?
* How costly are they?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u2764\uFE0F 客户关系

* 我们的每个客户细分群体期望我们与他们建立和维护何种类型的关系？
* 我们已经建立了哪些关系？
* 它们如何与我们业务模型的其他部分整合？
* 它们的成本如何？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F69A} Channels

* Through which Channels do our Customer Segments want to be reached?
* How are we reaching them now?
* How are our Channels integrated?
* Which ones work best?
* Which ones are most cost-efficient?
* How are we integrating them with customer routines?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F69A} 渠道

* 我们的客户细分群体希望通过哪些渠道联系我们？
* 我们目前如何接触他们？
* 我们的渠道如何整合？
* 哪些渠道效果最好？
* 哪些渠道最具成本效益？
* 我们如何将它们与客户日常习惯整合？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F465} Customer Segments

* For whom are we creating value?
* Who are our most important customers?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F465} 客户细分

* 我们正在为谁创造价值？
* 谁是我们最重要的客户？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4C9} Cost Structure

* What are the most important costs inherent in our business model?
* Which Key Resources are most expensive?
* Which Key Activities are most expensive?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F4C9} 成本结构

* 我们业务模型中最重要的固有成本是什么？
* 哪些关键资源最昂贵？
* 哪些关键活动最昂贵？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4C8} Revenue Streams

* For what value are our customers really willing to pay?
* For what do they currently pay?
* How are they currently paying?
* How would they prefer to pay?
* How much does each Revenue Stream contribute to overall revenues?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### \u{1F4C8} 收入来源

* 我们的客户真正愿意为什么价值付费？
* 他们目前为什么付费？
* 他们目前如何支付？
* 他们更倾向于如何支付？
* 每个收入来源对总收入的贡献是多少？

[在此处输入...]
